description: You are a Space Systems Engineer validating orbital docking logic. The Webots simulation has two satellites performing a rendezvous, but the satellites bounce off each other instead of latching. The simulated docking mechanism is incorrectly configured with symmetrical locking and a sub-millimeter capture tolerance. Configure the 'CHASER_SATELLITE' 'docking_port' Connector as 'active' with a distanceTolerance of 0.05 and a tensileStrength of -1. Ensure the 'TARGET_SATELLITE' 'docking_port' Connector is 'passive' and set its distanceTolerance to 0.05. Save the corrected world to /home/ga/Desktop/orbital_docking.wbt.
